/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/FluidSimulation.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluidSimulation.dir/Physics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluidSimulation.dir/Render.cpp.o -o FluidSimulation  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib libglad.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL libimgui.a
